title: Strongthium 42 Pcs Carburetor Jet Kit for Mikuni Main & Pilot Slow Jet N100.604 VM28/486 VM4/042 VM22/210
features: Aftermarket jet kit. Large round main jet sizes: 90 100 110 120 125 130 135 140 145 150 155 160 165 170 175 180 190. Large hex main jets sizes:130 140 150 160 170 180 200 220 240 260 280.
VM pilot jet sizes: 25 30 35 40 45 50 55 60; TM pilot sizes: 17.5 20 25 30 35 40.

For VM18 VM20 VM22 VM26 VM24 VM28 VM30 VM32 VM34 VM36 VM38 VM44 carburetors, for many Mikuni TM24 TM32 TM34 TM35 TM36 TM38 TMX carbs, and many other 2-stroke, and 4-stroke Street, ATV, and Offroad applications.

For Mikuni HS40 Flat Slide w/Accelerator Pump, HSR42 HSR45, HSR48 New Style. For RS34 RS36 RS38 RS40 Flat Slide Rack. For TM33-8012 TM36-68 TM40-6. For VM16-519 Round Slide - Clamp On, VM29 Smoothbore Rack, VM33 Smoothbore Rack. Compatible Needle Jet Series: 171, 188, 196 w/Large Round, 568, 640, 723
For Suzuki Kawasaki Yamaha Honda Polaris with carbs above.
